PublicDescription: This event counts CPU clock cycles when the PE is not in WFE/WFI. The clock measured by this event is defined as the physical clock driving the CPU logic.

This event increments at a constant frequency equal to the rate of increment of the System Counter, CNTPCT_EL0.
This event does not increment when the PE is in WFE/WFI.

Entitled CPU slots.
This event counts the number of slots. When in ST mode, this event shall increment by PMMIR_EL1.SLOTS quantities, and when in SMT partitioned resource mode (regardless of in WFI state or otherwise), this event is incremented by PMMIR_EL1.SLOTS/2 quantities.
